metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates provider/config/runtime compatibility only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Model config uses temperature null per OpenAI GPT-5.5 compatibility policy.
Prior Gan-only smoke: runs/gan_s0_smoke_gpt5_5_openai (1 record; provider plumbing only).
Record token usage, latency, and billing when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
